div.p: Direct Dereference vs Safe Probe Read with verifier-guaranteed bounds checking

g.text: ACCEPTED: Safe Probe Read with Error Handling

ul.li: R3: ptr to filename (unknown kernel address)

R0: return value (scalar, integer range [-4095, 256])
[0, 256]: bytes read (success)
[-4095, -1]: error code (failure)

div.p: Verifier Invariant: The helper function guarantees that:

ol.li: Memory read never exceeds R2 bytes.
No kernel page fault can occur (exception handler logic).
Registers R1-R5 must be re-initialized before use.
